summary: Verify, push, and optionally open a PR for a worktree.

flags.summary: Base branch for the diff/PR (default: the repo's default branch).
Verification tier passed to the verify script (default: 2).
Lint only changed files instead of the full lint pass.
Skip running the verify script entirely.
Open a PR via gh and link it to any tracked tasks.
Override the PR title (default: the latest commit subject).
Read the PR body from a file instead of auto-generating one.
Preview the steps without running verify/push/PR creation.

summary: Render the shipping-workflow prompt instead of running it.
